must_do.full_text:
"I was a fool."  
Elon Musk 
In a stunning moment in federal court today, Elon admitted under oath that he feels like a fool for donating $44M to start OpenAI. Why? Because he built it to save humanity, only to watch it become an $800B "closed-source" giant for Microsoft.

But https://t.co/Qi2YS0i8Aw
must_do.summary: Elon Musk在法庭作证称后悔向OpenAI捐赠4400万美元，因其演变为微软的800亿美元闭源商业项目。涉及AI治理与商业伦理的重大争议。
angles: Elon法庭认怂：4400万美元打水漂的真相

AI巨头内战升级：Musk vs OpenAI的终极对决

must_do.full_text:

> Upload any clip up to 15s

must_do.full_text:
The thesis is simple: the future belongs to individuals who build compounding AI systems, not to individuals who use corporate-owned centralized AI tools.

I'm trying to build these in open source so you can have them for free. That's what GBrain is.
must_do.summary: Garry Tan提出AI未来属于构建复合型AI系统的个人，而非依赖企业中心化工具的用户。他正在开源GBrain项目，让用户免费获得个人AI系统。
viral_signals: 有人物故事（Garry Tan创业者身份）
反常识/意外性（开源免费vs企业付费模式对比）
